reviews.review_description: I have been trying out the Basic VR.  Anatomical display for my Sports Medicine students has been a great success everyone enjoys it. Ive been work on the technical side of link multiple Quests into the same VR if possible.  If the professional application allows for surgical application, then would be great.

developer_response.body:
Hey FrostedStingray71,

Thank you for your review! We are very happy to hear that Human Anatomy VR has been a success with your Sports Medicine students and that everyone has been enjoying the anatomical display.

If you would like to connect multiple Meta Quest headsets into the same virtual room for collaborative learning, this is possible through the Multi-User feature included in our Essential VR license.

Regarding surgical training, Human Anatomy VR is primarily focused on anatomy education, so surgical procedures are not currently part of the application.

We would love to hear more about your experience and feedback. Please feel free to contact us at info@medicinevirtual.com

Best regards,
Team Virtual Medicine

reviews.review_description: I am using this app to encourage people at the university to use VR, and everyone loves it.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your feedback, Mariano. We’re very glad to hear that Human Anatomy VR is helping generate interest in VR at your university and that people are enjoying it. If you need any support in encouraging wider adoption at your university, feel free to reach out to us at info@medicinevirtual.com

reviews.review_description:
I’m an medical student from first year and I really loved the CT scans and all the possibilities with this app.
I’m still learning how it works properly but one thing that I missed in the app is some anatomical pin points on certain bones, and not just the info. 
Would be an perfect app with this

developer_response.body: Thank you for the great feedback. We’re glad you’re enjoying the VR DICOM module. Anatomical pin points are a great suggestion, and feedback like this helps guide what we add next.

reviews.review_title: Wish I had had this when I was a student
reviews.review_description: I took this app to the Royal Society of Medicine, to a conference of plastic surgeons specializing in rhinoplasty.  They were very impressed!  The most common comments were: "I wish I had had this when I was a student" and "This is the future".  They especially appreciated the Ant Mode, where you are shrunk very small, and can fly up into a nose and explore inside it.  Fantastic for showing students small body parts that are too difficult to access using other methods.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing your experience! We’re happy to hear that the surgeons at the Royal Society of Medicine found our app so impactful. We truly appreciate your support.
Team Virtual Medicine

reviews.review_title: This is my 2nd year to use it
reviews.review_description: As a healthcare faculty, this is my 2nd year to teach my students by integrating this VR program into my neuroscience course. I will keep using it as an alternative solution!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing your thoughts and for using our app in your neuroscience course. Please let us know if there’s anything we can add that would help you with teaching. 
We really appreciate your feedback!

reviews.review_description: As a healthcare faculty, this is my first year to teach my students by integrating this VR program into my neuroscience course and found this perfect app

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing your feedback. 
We’re really glad our app has been a good fit for your neuroscience course and is helpful for your students. If you ever need tips for classroom use or have feature requests, feel free to reach out at info@medicinevirtual.com

reviews.review_description: I purchased the Personal subscription and it's a major help for self-study after my A/P classes. Strong recommendation.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your kind review. We are very happy to hear that Human Anatomy VR is helping with your Anatomy and Physiology self-study. 

We truly appreciate your recommendation!

reviews.review_description: Before using Human Anatomy VR, anatomy was one of the hardest subjects for me because cadaver access was limited and it was not easy to really understand what I was seeing. With this app, I can study anytime, explore structures in 3D, and take my time learning things properly. Being able to rotate organs and look at everything more closely has made a big difference. It has made anatomy easier to understand and much easier to memorize for me and my group

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for sharing this. It means a lot to hear that Human Anatomy VR has helped make anatomy more understandable and easier to memorize for you and your group. We will continue to work hard on the app to make it better with each update!

reviews.review_description: This app really great!! Using it for my pta program and it’s helping a lot

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words. We’re really glad to hear our application is helping with your PTA program and supporting your studies. Feedback like this really motivates us to keep improving.

reviews.review_description: There isn’t any amount of words put in any order that can capture the amazingness of this app wether you’re in the medical field or not this app can teach anyone ALOT

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words! We’re thrilled to hear that our app has helped you learn anatomy. Your feedback truly means a lot to our team!

reviews.review_description: A truly immersive and interactive way to learn anatomy—Human Anatomy VR brings every system to life with impressive clarity. The 3D models, intuitive controls, and realistic environments make complex concepts easy to grasp. Highly recommended for students, educators, and anyone looking to experience anatomy like never before

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the great review! We’re really glad to hear that our app helped make anatomy clearer and more engaging for you. If there’s anything we can improve to earn a full 5 stars from you, we’d love to hear your feedback at info@medicinevirtual.com
Team Virtual Medicine

reviews.review_description: I am still exploring this app, but so far it has been exciting. I have really enjoyed pulling out body parts and examining them. It is an immersive experience. I look forward to exploring more. Thank you for the efforts in making an exceptional learning tool!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your kind words! We’re thrilled to hear you’re enjoying our Application and finding it valuable for learning. Happy to have you onboard.
Team Virtual Medicine

reviews.review_description: Blew my mind when it came to understanding human anatomy on a detailed level.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the great review. We are continuing to improve the app with every update, and comments like yours really motivate us to keep going.

reviews.review_description: Great resource to become familiar with anatomy and some physiology. Would love to see more kinematic and sport motion videos in the future for sports medicine healthcare professionals.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback! We’re really glad the app is helping you with anatomy and physiology. Your suggestion about adding more kinematic and sport-motion content is very helpful, and we’ll definitely take it into consideration for future updates.

reviews.review_description: Human Anatomy VR is an outstanding educational tool. It provides an immersive and interactive way for students to explore and understand human biology, making complex concepts much easier to grasp. As a school, we highly recommend it for science education — it has great potential to transform classroom learning into an engaging experience.

developer_response.body:
We’re delighted to hear that Human Anatomy VR is making science education more engaging and helping students grasp human biology with ease. 

It’s wonderful to know that schools like yours recognize the potential of our platform, and we’ll continue working hard to add even more value to the classroom experience.

reviews.review_title: The next level of Human Body education
reviews.review_description:
I stumbled across the Human Anatomy VR app after I bought my first Meta Quest headset. It made such an impression on me, that I promptly bought a second Meta Quest headset so I could explore finding a way to incorporate this app into the media and health promotion work I do with my clients in Australia. 

The free trial allows use of the 'skeleton' that is enjoyable considering there is no time limit on it when you compare it to the trials of other apps that limit working trials to 15 mins. 

The price of the Human Anatomy VR app education version is great considering what you get in terms of additional detailed anatomical models that provide amazing insights about the organs and features of the human body that you can explore in a way never before possible - with your own hands! 

The next level, Human Anatomy VR 'Institution licence', provides opportunities for you to be in the room along with other people at the same time (multi user mode) so the learning experience can be shared, opening up opportunities for genuine fun, plus serious experiential medical learning for people of all ages and aptitudes. 

The Institution licence also provides opportunities for hospitals and medical institutions to examine radiology and other scans inside the Human Anatomy VR app via a Dicom viewer that is included inside this licence, paving the way for remote, collaborative analysis of medical digital imaging. 

The Institution licence also has a large library of cadavers inside the app that would be of strong value and utility for medical education institutions and university medical schools. 

However, any app is only as good as the team behind it and I have found the Human Body VR app to be supported by a friendly team of professionals with a strong customer service ethos and timely, clear responses to questions. The team seems to be committed to regular updates and is interested in feedback from users to continually improve the learning experience inside the app. 

In summary, we are very impressed with this app and feel it helps to increase the broader business case for the serious introduction of Virtual Reality learning  across business, education and government.  

Specifically, Human Anatomy VR merits serious consideration by hospitals, health services, universities and leading schools. 

I have tested this app with my whole family, including 2 teenagers with short attention spans who continue to find it engaging and educational. 

Highly recommended.

reviews.review_title: One of them Poors. Please re-evaluate
reviews.review_description:
I'd feel obligated to add another 20% but unfortunately due to many factors I'm segregated and deprived of knowledge and wisdom of great potential.

App could be opening pathways careers and future hopes and dreams if not only to be blocked and labeled as a Poor again.

Us Poors are who should be targeted for the future development of the world.

Free for Poors please 🙏😢 🙂 😊

developer_response.body:
Hi LarkingFunt,

Thank you for sharing your thoughts — we truly appreciate your honesty and passion.

We completely understand that financial limitations can be a real barrier, and that’s exactly why we created a more accessible version of our app. Instead of the Institutional edition, please search for “Human Anatomy VR” on the Meta Quest store — it’s available as a one-time purchase for just $29.99, with no subscriptions or hidden fees.

While this version doesn’t include regular updates or advanced features like multi-user mode or the DICOM viewer, it still gives you access to the entire human anatomy, with over 13,000 detailed structures in VR — a powerful learning tool in itself.

We believe in making education more accessible, and we’re glad you reached out.
Wishing you all the best on your journey.

 Team Virtual Medicine

reviews.review_description:
Excellent program. Such software allows to perceive anatomy better than flat pictures in books and atlases. In my student years I could not even think about it. 
I use this program in my surgical practice when I am preparing to operate in an anatomical region where I do not often work and i need to repeat the anatomy of this region. The ability to view dicom in 3D is simply amazing. Thanks to the developers for the product.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your generous feedback! We’re glad the 3D anatomy and DICOM features are enhancing your work, and we’ll keep improving the experience.
Team Virtual Medicine

reviews.review_description: I’ve been using this 3D anatomy app for my studies and it has been an amazing tool! The 3D visualization makes it much easier to understand the structures of the human body, especially when identifying organs, muscles, and systems. The models are very detailed and the navigation is intuitive. It has really helped me retain the content I see in class. I highly recommend it to anyone studying anatomy! 🇧🇷

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your wonderful feedback! We're thrilled to hear that the 3D visualization is helping you better understand and retain anatomy knowledge. It’s exactly what we hoped the app would do for students like you. Wishing you continued success in your studies — and if you ever have suggestions or ideas for improvement, we’d love to hear them!

Team Virtual Medicine

reviews.review_description: you have to pay $30 for this and even after that, you have to pay $450/yr to use the content. this makes is completely useless without a subscription. why even bother charging the $30 if you can only access the skeleton. netter's human anatomy is far more useful than this with detailed colored disections than this.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback, tapiocadds.

We're sorry to hear that the pricing for our Institutional version didn’t meet your expectations. It looks like you may have downloaded Human Anatomy VR for Institutions, which is specifically designed for universities, medical schools, and libraries. This version includes features tailored for classroom and professional use, and as such, follows an institutional pricing model.

If you're an individual user, we recommend one of our lower-tier personal introductory subscriptions:

Student – $29.99

Educator – $89.99

Professional – $99.99

All of these plans unlock the full human anatomy content. Without a subscription, only the skeleton is available for preview.

Alternatively, for a one-time purchase with lifetime access, we also offer Human Anatomy VR (Personal Edition), available separately on the Meta Quest Store. This version is ideal for individual users and offers the same high-quality anatomical content in a simpler, one-time payment model.

We hope this helps clarify the options available, and we truly appreciate your feedback and interest in our software. If you have any further questions, feel free to reach out.

Warm regards,
The Virtual Medicine Team

reviews.review_description: I'm just a casual user, and I was really blown away by how fully fleshed out (sorry 😏) this software is. One thing I would suggest is to have a license for casual users like me, who are not medical students, educators, or medical professionals. Perhaps you could limit functionality in some way (e.g. restrict to High School only, etc.) to enable this type of account.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your kind words and thoughtful feedback — we really appreciate it!

We completely understand your point, and we’re happy to let you know that we’ve created a version of the app specifically for individual users like you. It’s called Human Anatomy VR, and you can find it directly on the Meta Quest Store. 

Hopefully, this version will be a better fit for your needs as it doesn't work on a subscription basis like our Institutional application. Thanks again for taking the time to share your thoughts!

reviews.review_title: The overall experience is very solid
reviews.review_description: The ability to read real CT files through PC is mind-blowing. The body structure is detailed and interactive. Cooperation encyclopaedia with all the systems on dead people is interesting to learn. Moreover you can connect multiple people to the same room , for example a patient and doctor or professor and a few students. It was working stable so I consider it a banger for a buck.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the great feedback! We’re glad the CT viewer, detailed anatomy, and multi‑user sessions are providing real value for you.
Team Virtual Medicine

reviews.review_description:
Don’t install this app, unless you are definitelygoing to use it, as you can never remove it/uninstall it from your library!
Why force this upon us?

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback Elystan.

We completely understand your concern. Unfortunately, the inability to remove an app from the library after installation is a limitation of the Meta Quest platform itself and not something we, as developers, can control. We’ve already reached out to Meta Quest Support to request improvements to this feature.

In the meantime, please make sure your device is updated to the latest system version, as Meta makes adjustments to library and app management behavior through OS updates.

We truly appreciate your understanding, and we’re here if you have any further questions.

– The Virtual Medicine Team

reviews.review_description: What a perfect app! Didn't even know that software like this exists, until professor at our Uni brought it to class. Absolutely boosted the whole learning experience. Kudos

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your amazing comment! We're glad your professor introduced the app and that it made such a big impact on your learning experience. That’s exactly why we created it — to bring anatomy to life in the classroom. Wishing you all the best in your studies!

Team Virtual Medicine

reviews.review_title: Con; requires repeating payments to use
reviews.review_description: The title says it all; this app I a con, it won't let you do anything past the tutorial unless you give in to d3mands to keep paying them off. Do not waste your time installing

developer_response.body:
We're sorry to hear that you feel this way about our application. Transparency is very important to us, which is why we clearly mention our subscription model at the very top of the app description on the Meta Quest Store.

Our goal is to offer a high-quality educational experience, and subscriptions help us continue to develop and improve the content. That said, we truly appreciate your feedback and will keep it in mind as we continue to refine the experience.

Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts.
Team Virtual Medicine

reviews.review_description: So the man has a 🍆 but, the woman doesn't have a 🐱? I thought this game was supposed to be scientifically and biologically accurate.

developer_response.body:
Hi there forevergamer5599!
Our app includes all 15 body systems for both male and female anatomy—reproductive organs included.
To view the female reproductive system, open the Models panel and toggle “Reproductive.” You can then switch between male and female models at any time,

If you need a hand locating the toggle, just drop us a note at info@medicinevirtual.com We’re happy to help!

Team Virtual Medicine

reviews.review_description: I’ve been using this app to study for my undergraduate anatomy practicals and it definitely helps! Especially when you don’t have access to studying donors every day.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your kind words! We're really glad to hear that Human Anatomy VR has been helpful in preparing for your anatomy practicals. Making anatomy more accessible—especially when cadaver labs aren’t always available—is exactly what we made our application for.

Wishing you all the best in your studies, and if there’s anything we can do to improve your experience, don’t hesitate to let us know!
Team Virtual Medicine

reviews.review_description: I caught my 8 year old son playing this

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! We're happy to hear that your son is enjoying the game. We hope it continues to provide both fun and learning. Happy exploring!

reviews.review_description: As a BSc (Hons) sports science grad and Public Health postgrad, this would have been useful 10 years ago haha. Everything you could need to pass your first units at university or as physical therapist / massage therapist . I'll mark a star down as I cannot find common site injuries, diseases and remedies which would make this the perfect app for students and practitioners

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We're glad you find the app valuable and appreciate your suggestion to add common site injuries, diseases, and remedies. We'll take this into consideration for future updates to make our app even better!

reviews.review_title: Awesome! The BEST A&P app on Meta so far
reviews.review_description: NYC paramedic and nursing student here. This is a great A&P learning tool! So far it is the BEST one I’ve found. The creators of this app went to great lengths to make sure they could be as accurate as possible, and I think they did a great job. I think this is a PROFESSIONAL learning tool, it’s not a “game” app, so expect to pay for it as you’d do for your professional education. Kudos to the creators. For this type of learning tools is that I bought my Meta Quest 3. Recommended!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your amazing feedback! We're thrilled to hear that you find our app a valuable learning tool. Your kind words motivate us to keep delivering the best experience possible. Best of luck with your studies and career.

reviews.review_description: Outstanding views, easy to use, great tool for healthcare students.

developer_response.body:
Bill.Lemony,
We appreciate your feedback!

reviews.review_description: Ok I would like a break down of the difference. when I read  in the details it is showing me they all offering different studying of the body.  Like the student is limited to what the professional is offering. for ex: the professional talks about understanding your condition and diseases; but the student doesn't talks about that. I am not talking about the features and function I am talking about and asking do they offer the same knowledge and education because from what I read when you click on it they all gives different details what they offer. If you can help me to understand this and break it down for me I appreciate it. Also why are they difference prices because one must offer more than the other.  Thank you. I gave it a 3 star because it left me not understanding the price and difference what they offer over all I think it is a good app but if I can get a better understanding of your price and difference's.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback! We understand that the differences between the licenses may not be immediately clear, and we’d be happy to explain them in detail.

Each version is designed for different users, but they all provide the same comprehensive anatomical knowledge—the main differences lie in the features and usage permissions.

Please feel free to reach out to us at info@medicinevirtual.com, and we’ll gladly clarify everything for you.

reviews.review_description: Why is the d so detailed and the vajajay isn't a thing anymore

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! Could you kindly clarify your statement so we can better understand your message? Your input is valuable, and we'd be happy to assist further. Please feel free to contact us directly at info@medicinevirtual.com with any specific questions or suggestions.

reviews.review_title: Location of portal vein is wrong.
reviews.review_description:
I think this is a very well-made app.
However, the superior mesenteric vein and portal vein running in front of the pancreas is anatomically inaccurate.

If this is corrected, it will be even better.

developer_response.body:
Dear wahahanaki,
Thank you for pointing out this inaccuracy. We appreciate your feedback and will review this with our anatomy experts to ensure it’s corrected promptly.
Wishing you a wonderful day,
Team Virtual Medicine

reviews.review_description: Layers of the skin are not correct.. really? What else isn't correct? Can't recommend this as educational if the information is not right.  Someone go in and look.  The layers of the epidermis are not labeled correctly!  Poor!

developer_response.body: Thank you for bringing this to our attention. We have corrected the labeling of the skin layers in the latest version of our software.  We appreciate your input and are dedicated to delivering the highest standard and quality in our application. Please don’t hesitate to reach out if you have any further concerns or suggestions!

reviews.review_description: boring

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing your feedback. We're sorry to hear that you found our application boring. We strive to improve and provide the best possible experience, and we would love to understand more about your specific concerns. Could you please expand on what aspects you feel need improvement? 
Feel free to reach out to us directly via email at info@medicinevirtual.com, and we'll work on addressing your feedback to better meet your needs.

reviews.review_description: This app is something else. I wish it existed when I was in anatomy class. If it were a 9ne time purchase, I would buy it. I'm not about the subscription plans.

developer_response.body: Hi, we're so glad to hear you're enjoying the app! We understand that subscription plans aren’t for everyone, so we’re excited to let you know that we do offer a one-time purchase option for our B2C version of Human Anatomy VR: https://www.meta.com/en-gb/experiences/human-anatomy-vr/6643334382420936/

reviews.review_description: Don’t download - just another money grab masquerading as educational.

developer_response.body:
Dear Snowsecure,

Thank you for your feedback regarding our subscription model. We understand that it may not be suitable for everyone. As an alternative, we also offer a single-purchase version of our application, Human Anatomy VR, which includes basic features for individual users.

Human Anatomy VR for Institutions is designed for organizations looking for a comprehensive subscription service that delivers the highest quality experience.

We appreciate your understanding and wish you a great day!

reviews.review_title: Human Anatomy VR for institutions ROCKS!
reviews.review_description: This is one fantastic app! The details are amazing and the options seem endless. This should be a standard learning aid in anatomy classes everywhere! Thank you for sharing it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words! We’re delighted to hear that you find the app so valuable. Your suggestion about incorporating Human Anatomy VR as a standard tool in anatomy classes resonates with us, and we appreciate your support in spreading the word.

reviews.review_description: Broken my wrist viewing the bones in the app gave me a better understanding of where each break occurred

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback. 
We’re sorry to hear about your wrist! It’s great to know that the app helped you visualize your injuries and understand the breaks better. 
We hope you have a speedy recovery!

reviews.review_description: Not able to load anything. Keep telling me to log out because following movements hasnt be settled up. But even pressing the meta button to log out is not working. Very annoying

developer_response.body:
We’re sorry to hear you’re experiencing this issue. It sounds frustrating, and we want to help you get back to enjoying the app.
 Please try restarting your device and ensure that you have the latest version of the app installed.
If the problem persists, feel free to reach out to our support team for further assistance.

reviews.review_description: I payed for my license, but I cant login into the system.

Hello Ricardo,

This is Oliver from the Virtual Medicine Support Team, and I would like to help you resolve the issues with your license.

Regards,
Oliver, Virtual Medicine Support Team

reviews.review_description:
The best , really amazing medical VR program .
The best medical program in the world ..
Easy to use , very clear and helpful for the medical students and doctors ..
Should all medical students and doctors register in this app.
Thanks for the best medical program in the world..

reviews.review_title: Setting the standard in VR Education
reviews.review_description: This app redefines learning with its 3D visualization,intuitive interface and comprehensive educational content. Undoubtedly a game-changer in VR medicine

reviews.review_title: For the cost, could be a LOT better!
reviews.review_description: A super dumbed-down anatomy app. Hasn't been updated in at least 2 years. This should have fully-animated body functions in full-body mode. The female model is only a torso that doesn't offer a pregnant version. Feels really "bare-bones" (lol), considering how far VR has come. Very disappointed and cannot get a refund in spite of only exploring it for for about 30 minutes.

reviews.review_title: No longer able to access Meta Data Comp
reviews.review_description:
Hello,
I actually love this app but today when I put my headset on I was notified that the app was not in compliance with Meta Data policy. I purchased the educator license a few months ago and have not had a problem till today. In the app I was prompted to "buy a subscription" but all of the subscriptions now say "not available". I tried to contact Virtual Medicine through their website but the form they have you fill out gave me a "whoops something went wrong" notice the three times I tried to submit it... if someone from Virtual medicine can give an update on what is going on and when I can access my purchase subscription again that would be wonderful

developer_response.body:
Hello,
We are currently experiencing issues with the Meta Store Platform services and we are working on getting this resolved as soon as possible. We apologize for any inconvenience caused and would like to offer you a Premium license for the duration until the issue is resolved. Please contact us at info@medicinevirtual.com and we will provide you with instructions to activate your license.
Best regards,
Virtual Medicine Support Team

reviews.review_description:
I downloaded the trial version and thinking of getting a subscription but can not understand the difference in features between the professional and educator subscriptions.
1 says presentation and the the other says you can educate patients with it but does not list the features.
What is the difference between the 2 please?
Would you be able to add more environments and more animations of different body systems in actions? 
Thanks.

I wanted to sell my oculus but with this app I won’t do it :-) 

Very realistic and nicely done. A real help in med edu. 

I’ll purchase it.

developer_response.body: We're delighted to hear that the Human Anatomy VR app has made such a positive impact to convinced you to keep your Quest! We look forward to having you as customer, and we're here to support your educational needs. Thank you for your support!

reviews.review_description: Its a nice app, but lacks some serious features. The human anatomy is way more complicated and detailed then here. Add the features from the App "Visible Body" and then we are talking. Ah yes and add german language. Then i would consider a sub for a year for like 40 Euros.

developer_response.body:
Hi VRJohhny,
Could you please email us at info@medicinevirtal.com what serious features you are missing? Regarding the detail of the anatomical content, our app contains more than 10,000 anatomical structures designed by medical experts, so we recommend switching the content level to "university" rather than "high school" when you launch the app or in the settings. We hope you will reconsider your rating after this step. Thank you.

reviews.review_title: A subscription for a  buggy app?
reviews.review_description:
I get that it’s still in development, but no one wants to pay a subscription for something like this.
It was glitchy for me, so I wouldn’t part with a penny until it’s a complete product.
No way will I be paying a subscription, so you’ve already lost one customer. And other reviewers say the same.

I purchased a Professional license, but multi-user mode is not available.
https://www.medicinevirtual.com/professional.html - This page says what is available.
I need to teach my students, so I bought the Pro license.
What do I need to do to enable this option?

developer_response.body:
Hello goracius78,

Thank you for your review. Please contact our team about this query here: info@medicinevirtual.com

Thank you.

reviews.review_description: Ok so I’m a high schooler doing full anatomy studies and is planning on being in the medical field! When I seen it was free I got excited but when I seen how much the subscriptions are it’s insane! My family don’t have much money and I wanted the app to help find where parts of the body are! But the subscription is way to much! I can get better books for less then the monthly subscription! I was extremely disappointed!

developer_response.body:
Hi Kbug2025!
The introductory student subscription is 29,99 € / YEAR (not monthly). We strive to be the most affordable among competing products despite offering the most advanced content and features. 
Subscriptions are the industry standard because it's the only sustainable model that ensures the high quality of our content, which we regularly improve.  If you are considering a purchase and would like to try the full content again, please contact us at info@medicinevirtual.com

We hope that our reply clarified the matter of the issue and that you will reconsider your rating.

reviews.review_description:
The title only says it all. I am using this to educate high school students and this sends totally the wrong message. Why bother rendering a whole female body?  It feels discriminatory.

The rest is great but I can’t believe a company would be so stuck in the 1980s

developer_response.body:
Hello TDOculustoo,
We are sorry to hear that you are not satisfied with our female model. We are following scientifically approved anatomical manuals, guidelines and atlases to show primary parts that are anatomically distinct and significant. Please know that we are continually improving our models and application to deliver the best experience possible.

The development and production of the anatomical content of this quality is very costly and time consuming but our team of 3D graphic designers in cooperation with medical experts work hard to bring you more anatomical models with each update. We are planning to bring whole female anatomy model (with anatomical parts that are identical to the male anatomy) in the future as soon as possible.

We are saddened to see that you gave our application 1 star review even though, you think the rest of our application is great and you like all its content that it has to offer to educate your students.

We hope that our reply clarified the matter of the issue and that you will reconsider your rating.

Thank you very much for your understanding.

reviews.review_description: The content is very good both in terms of graphics and content but in principle I am against any form of subscription, I pay for an app only once! this trend that is being proposed more and more in every area (subscriptions and services instead of ownership) finds my firm opposition! in addition to this, the test time of all the functions, which should have been one hour, was limited to the first five minutes of the first start. with subsequent starts it gives me access only to the skeleton and offers me the unpleasant subscriptions

developer_response.body:
Hello serpe.massimo,

We're glad you like the content of our app. Subscriptions are the industry standard because it's the only sustainable model that ensures the high quality of our content, which we regularly improve. 

We apologize for the misunderstanding with the trial. We provide a 2-hour trial period that is valid from the activation of the trial. The duration of the trial continues from the activation time even if you are not using the app (not in-app time). We will explain this better in the next update.

If you are considering a purchase and would like to try the full content again, please contact us at info@medicinevirtual.com

reviews.review_description: Interesting app and would be very useful if you are struggling to learn college A&P. This has great potential as an educational tool, I would love to see them add interactive medical procedures and diseases to this. As a current student of Radiation Therapy I would buy this in a heartbeat if it allowed me to practice simulated treatments.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your encouraging feedback! 
We’re glad to hear that you also see the app’s potential as a learning tool. 
Your suggestions for interactive medical procedures and simulated treatments for Radiation Therapy are exciting, and we’ll keep them in mind as we develop future updates.

reviews.review_description: I was only able to test the skeletal model. This shows promising features but you are unable to select individual bones in the hand or feet. You are also unable to select foramen.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback! 
Just to clarify, once you press "unfold" on the hand, hand, or skull models, you'll be able to select and interact with individual structures, including the foramen.
We appreciate your insights as we continue to perfect the app!

reviews.review_description: Very intuitive and educational. Would recommend to anyone interested in biology!

reviews.review_title: Great app for any medical student!
reviews.review_description: I have been looking for an application that would truly visualize anatomical structures to the slightest detail and help me with my studies. This application met all my expectations and I highly recommend this app to all students that need help with anatomy like myself. I hope this app will be available in the main store in the near future. Love it.

reviews.review_title: The best VR anatomy app i have tried!👏
reviews.review_description: Very intuitive app to learn anatomy from. 👍 Great tutorial! 👍 High level of detail of anatomy structures is even better when using ant mode and I can fly around huge body! I also like the hand tracking option. 👍👍

developer_response.body:
Hello pikino22,
Thank you for your review, we appreciate you like our app!🤩 We will continue to innovate the most advanced VR anatomy platform to make it even better!🚀

reviews.review_description:
This game is so good and it’s very entertaining and helpful.
It helped me my exam in anatomy and I got 3.5 out of 4!!

developer_response.body: Congratulations on your fantastic exam results! We're thrilled to hear that our Human Anatomy VR app played a part in your success. Thank you for sharing your positive experience, and we're delighted that our app was both entertaining and helpful for your anatomy studies. If you ever need more support or have any feedback, please don't hesitate to reach out. Keep up the great work!
